summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Jobflow AI job tracker - both backend APIs and frontend functionality. All 14 requested features tested successfully. Backend APIs 100% working (auth, CRUD, AI endpoints). Frontend features verified: login page, auth redirects, board page, job creation, ATS checker, sidebar navigation. No critical issues found.
passed_tests: Login page renders at /login with 'Continue with Google' button and periwinkle gradient background
Unauthenticated users redirected to /login when accessing /
Backend /api/auth/me endpoint returns user data when valid session token provided
Backend /api/jobs CRUD endpoints work: GET returns empty array, POST creates job, PUT updates status, DELETE removes job
After login (with test session), board page loads showing empty state 'No applications yet' for new users
Add Application modal opens from topbar button, has Paste JD and Manual Entry tabs
Manual entry tab: filling title + company + status and saving creates a job card on the board
Job cards appear on the Kanban board after creation with correct data (Frontend Developer at TechCorp)
ATS Checker page at /ats shows left input panel (290px) with CV textarea, JD textarea
ATS Checker has two tabs: CV Analysis and Cover Letter
Sidebar shows authenticated user name and email (Test User, test.user.1773439513006@example.com)
Logout button works and redirects to login page
Backend AI endpoints exist and respond: /api/ai/parse-jd, /api/ai/analyze-cv, /api/ai/cover-letter
Navigation between Board and ATS Checker pages works correctly
